AUFZUEGE.settings.config.name: Elevator Configuration
AUFZUEGE.settings.config.label: Configure Elevators
AUFZUEGE.notifications.sceneNotFound: Target scene could not be determined.
AUFZUEGE.notifications.notEnoughFloors: This elevator is not configured correctly. It must have at least two floors defined.
AUFZUEGE.config.window.title: Manage Elevators
AUFZUEGE.config.window.description: Use the list below to edit existing elevators or create new connections.
AUFZUEGE.config.window.empty: No elevators have been created yet. Start by using the button above to define your first elevator.
AUFZUEGE.detail.window.title: Edit Elevator
AUFZUEGE.detail.window.name: Name
AUFZUEGE.detail.window.floorListDescript: Name your levels uniquely and link them to tiles or tokens.
AUFZUEGE.detail.window.emptyFloors: No floors defined yet. Create at least two levels to use the elevator.
AUFZUEGE.settings.sound.name: Elevator Sound
AUFZUEGE.settings.sound.hint: Select a sound file for the elevator.
AUFZUEGE.settings.volume.name: Elevator Volume
AUFZUEGE.settings.volume.hint: Adjust the volume of the elevator sound.
AUFZUEGE.settings.debug.name: Enable Debug Logging
AUFZUEGE.settings.debug.hint: If enabled, the module will log detailed information to the developer console (F12) to help diagnose issues.
AUFZUEGE.settings.autoPan.name: Auto-pan camera
AUFZUEGE.settings.autoPan.hint: Automatically center the viewport on the destination tile after using an elevator.
AUFZUEGE.settings.playSound.name: Play elevator sound
AUFZUEGE.settings.playSound.hint: Allow this client to hear the configured elevator sound when teleporting.
